Member.Name: Inspection
Member.Description: The inspection to show in this display

Member.Name: ScreenXPosition
Member.Description: The screen x position in pixels to show this display

Member.Name: ScreenYPosition
Member.Description: The screen y position in pixels to show this display

Member.Name: Width
Member.Description: The width of the display in pixels

Member.Name: Height
Member.Description: The height of the display in pixels
